name: Polka Dot Quick Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease a 9 X 5-inch loaf pan and set aside.
3. Cut the cranberries in half and place them in a small bowl.
4. In a medium bowl, combine the milk, egg, butter, and orange peel.
5. Sift the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt into a large bowl.
6. Add the halved cranberries, cheese, and nuts to the large bowl.
7. Toss with a fork to distribute evenly.
8. Add the milk mixture all at once and stir until just moistened.
9. Turn the batter into the prepared loaf pan and bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes in the preheated oven or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in the pan on a rack for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan.
11. Cool to room temperature on a wire rack before slicing.
